none.justification: Matches the GT chain from processCommand/lookupCommand through setCommand, setGenericCommand, lookupKeyWriteWithLink, setKeyByLink, and correctly splits the existing-key dbSetValue path from the new-key dbAddByLink -> dbAddInternal path. It also includes keyModified and lower kvstore/dict details beyond the required db.c write path, so the extra depth does not hurt.

ccodegraph.justification: Correctly lists dispatch through c->cmd->proc to setCommand, includes lookupKeyWriteWithLink, setKeyByLink, and the required exists vs. non-exists branches to dbSetValue or dbAddByLink -> dbAddInternal. It also notes keyModified and notifyKeyspaceEvent, matching the GT semantics.

lsp.justification: Mostly correct and includes setKeyByLink plus the dbSetValue vs. dbAddByLink -> dbAddInternal branch split, but lookupKeyWriteWithLink is only mentioned in passing without file/line as an ordered hop. It also omits the keyModified and notifyKeyspaceEvent steps called out in the GT, so it falls short of fully complete.
